rows.label: tev022501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Larry about Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Larry about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about Larry's BLADE colleagues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask about Larry's BLADE colleagues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Larry about data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Larry about data probes.

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mira is a huge world, and we still
know next to nothing about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Our base at NLA is well established, but we're now
in the same position as our ancestors who landed at
Plymouth Rock with a whole new world to explore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0003
rows.name:
And to achieve that goal, we'll need to
install data probes throughout Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Did you already hear about FrontierNet
from Defense Secretary Nagi?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you haven't, you should go
ask him. I think he's waiting
for you at the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm a member of Team Corondas, which is
centered around Captain Corondas and his
band of explorers from back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's a team loaded with former
professional explorers. Can you imagine
a better group for surveying Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0010
rows.name:
A lot of BLADEs get swept up in the
idea of joining a team like that
and going on grand adventures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0011
rows.name:
And while I'm a sub-leader now, I must
admit that I used to be one of them.
...I suppose I still am, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0012
rows.name:
As a veteran of the Coalition
forces, I was initially assigned
to Iriina's Interceptor Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0013
rows.name:
But when I heard Corondas talk about his ambitions,
I decided I wanted to be a part of them and
applied for a transfer to the Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0014
rows.name:
The captain really is a fascinating person. As a new
recruit, I'm sure they're working you hard, but you
should speak with Corondas if you ever have the chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Nelson's team has recently begun
surveying unexplored areas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0023
rows.name:
As a fellow Pathfinder, I
pray for their safe return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0038
rows.name:
You're that new recruit from Elma's
team that discovered what happened
to Nelson's crew, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0039
rows.name:
You have my thanks for that. My team has
worked with Nelson's on many occasions, and
we were all terribly worried about them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0040
rows.name:
Your report was heartbreaking, but at
least now we finally know what happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0041
rows.name:
As Pathfinder, my team has resolved to fill the
void left by their passing and do everything we
can to expand FrontierNet throughout Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0054
rows.name:
In addition to regular data probes, there are auxiliary
models that can be placed in neighboring placement sites
to improve the surrounding probes' capabilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0055
rows.name:
By putting them to clever use, we Pathfinder
can significantly increase the amount of
resources we mine and revenue we earn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0056
rows.name:
Our job is more than just tromping around
Mira installing data probes, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0057
rows.name:
The best Pathfinder are the ones
who plan from day one how to make
the most of such options.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0073
rows.name:
Have you heard of duplicator probes?
They're a type of auxiliary probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0087
rows.name:
I'm told they can duplicate the functions
of the data probe they are placed
adjacent to on the FrontierNet grid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0088
rows.name:
If true, it's something that could
be put to really good use...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0089
rows.name:
Basically, it would allow us to double the
capabilities of the limited amount of
high-performance data probes that are available to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0090
rows.name:
You could make a considerable amount
of revenue by using them wisely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Larry about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0074
rows.name:
We managed to rescue Bates
back in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0075
rows.name:
However, while we were there, we
were attacked by a mysterious xenoform
that called herself "Tempera."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0076
rows.name:
She was extremely strong, and seemed
to hate humans for some reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0077
rows.name:
I doubt that she's just going to
leave us alone now. I'd better tell
the other Pathfinder to be alert.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Larry about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0078
rows.name:
Thanks to you, Bates was able
to make it home safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0079
rows.name:
Poor kid really seems traumatized by what happened.
Just walking past a Doll earlier was enough to
trigger a memory that left him quivering.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0080
rows.name:
Was that Tempera woman in the
black Doll really so terrifying?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0081
rows.name:
Well, I'd better warn the other
Pathfinder about her. I have a bad
feeling this isn't over yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Larry about team leaders.

rows.label: tev022501_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Larry about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0082
rows.name:
Ha! That reminds me—do you
know why only our team addresses
its leader as "Captain"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0083
rows.name:
Captain Corondas is fond of saying, "We may have guns,
but we aren't soldiers—we're a team of adventurers
exploring an uncharted world, and I am your captain!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0084
rows.name:
He says it so often that everyone
just started calling him that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0085
rows.name:
I guess it's the people who embody
a team's ideals that naturally
gravitate towards becoming the leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0086
rows.name:
I'm sure it's like that with your Elma,
hmm? Only when you have a person like
that can a team truly come together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0091
rows.name:
We've suffered a great many losses, but
Team Corondas is still standing strong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0092
rows.name:
Bates, Peter, and Captain Corondas
have all made it back to us alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0093
rows.name:
And it's all thanks to you. I could never
have accomplished what you did myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0094
rows.name:
So thank you. We're all honored
to be working with you to
further expand FrontierNet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_SEL4011
rows.name: Ask Larry about team leaders.

rows.label: tev022501_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Larry about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0095
rows.name:
Did I ever tell you why only our team
addressed its leader as "Captain"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0096
rows.name:
Captain Corondas was fond of saying, "We have guns,
but we aren't soldiers—we're a team of adventurers
exploring an uncharted world, and I am your captain!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0097
rows.name:
He said it so often that everyone
just started calling him that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0098
rows.name:
I guess it's the people who embody
a team's ideals that naturally
gravitate towards becoming the leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0099
rows.name:
And once a team loses that person, I
suspect that few are able to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0100
rows.name:
Sadly, I doubt Team Corondas
will fare any differently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0105
rows.name:
I already told this to Peter, but...I'm
thinking about dissolving the team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0106
rows.name:
I just don't have the strength to
shoulder all of what I'd be
inheriting from Captain Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022501_MSG0107
rows.name:
I hope Team Elma continues to enjoy
the success you've had, and that you
never end up where we are now.[ST:wait ]
